blockers.workaround: Wait until ban clears; or SSH from a different IP. Single SSH session for Task 3's drill avoids re-tripping.

human_actions_pending.context: Deferred during Task 1 due to fail2ban. Not blocking — the Task 2 fixes are correct independent of the log content. Worth grabbing during Task 3's SSH session for the durable record.

decisions.name: Local SDK read substitutes for SSH during Task 1
decisions.summary: @paperclipai/plugin-sdk@2026.512.0 is a published npm package pinned exactly in package.json; its dist/types.d.ts is byte-identical here on Windows as on Countermoves. Task 1's API-SHAPES diagnostic is empirically grounded in the SDK source-of-truth even though SSH was blocked.

decisions.name: Plan 02-03 handlers had 8 systemic SDK shape drifts (not 2–3 as planned)
decisions.summary: Diagnosed in 02-03b-API-SHAPES.md: (1) issue.body vs description; (2) issues.get missing companyId; (3) issues.ancestry fabricated; (4) ctx.issue.documents.read fabricated; (5) ctx.activity.log.read fabricated (.log is write-only); (6) ctx.host fabricated (companyId must come from params); (7) ctx.db.query returns T[] directly not {rows}; (8) flatten-blocker-chain used ad-hoc HTTP path instead of ctx.issues.relations.get. Local handler Ctx types had hidden the drift from tsc by lying about the SDK surface.

decisions.name: Activity timeline reduced to comments-only at SDK 2026.512.0
decisions.summary: ctx.activity.log.read does not exist; only ctx.activity.log.write does. ActivityTimeline now derives from ctx.issues.listComments. State-change + work-product events not surfaceable until Paperclip ships an activity-read API. ROADMAP gap noted; revisit in Phase 3 if Eric flags the gap during dogfood.

decisions.name: Goals = milestone axis in Breadcrumb
decisions.summary: Paperclip has no Milestone primitive at SDK 2026.512.0; Goal is the closest semantic. Breadcrumb's three positions are project → goal(milestone) → parent issue.

next_action: In a fresh chat, type: `continue with plan 02-03b task 3`. Claude will run /gsd:resume-work, restore context, and walk the operator through Task 3's pre-snapshot → build/ship → install-helper → visual recheck → sub-checks B-F → post-snapshot → verdict script.
context_notes:
Plan 02-03b Tasks 1+2 fully landed across 4 commits on master (1e295fa, 8273ee7, f89f44b, 6e464c2). Verification gates: 100/100 tests pass; tsc --noEmit exit 0; npm run build produces dist/worker.js + dist/ui/index.{js,css} + dist/manifest.js; ESLint clean on src/; check-css-scope 47 selectors clean; audit-postinstall 219 packages clean.

What's in code now vs the 4 drill defects:
  Defect #1 (thin reader data): CLOSED — issue-reader.ts uses real SDK shapes for all 7 data slices; throws loudly on missing companyId; each slice in try/catch.
  Defect #2 (502 on flatten-blocker-chain): CLOSED — handler uses ctx.issues.relations.get BFS to depth 6; thrown errors caught → graceful EXTERNAL terminal.
  Defect #3 (React keys): CLOSED — ProseWithRefChips wraps text-node siblings in keyed React.Fragments.
  Defect #4 (npm install kludge): CLOSED — scripts/install-helper.sh + runbook §3b documents the gate-wrapped invocation.

Task 3 is operator-driven. SSH to Countermoves was timing out (fail2ban) as of pause time; expect ban to clear within an hour. Plan 02-03b-PLAN.md §Task 3 <how-to-verify> has the exact verbatim script for Eric to follow.

When resuming, READ in this order:
1. .planning/HANDOFF.json (this file)
2. .planning/phases/02-scaffold-and-surfaces/.continue-here.md
3. .planning/phases/02-scaffold-and-surfaces/02-03b-API-SHAPES.md
4. .planning/phases/02-scaffold-and-surfaces/02-03b-PLAN.md (Task 3 script especially)
5. .planning/phases/02-scaffold-and-surfaces/02-03-REHEARSAL-FINDINGS.md (what defects to verify closed)
